response:
Emily gathered 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more than Emily which made his total 39 blueberries. Additionally David collected three times as many blueberries as Sophia. This means Sophia collected 13 blueberries because 39 divided by 3 equals 13. 

***

Together Emily David and Sophia collected 24 plus 39 plus 13 which totals 76 blueberries. They used these blueberries to make muffins. Each batch of muffins required 9 blueberries. So they made 8 batches of muffins because 76 divided by 9 equals 8 with a remainder of 4. 

***

Each batch of muffins was sold for $5. So 8 batches sold for $5 each gives a total of $40. They had 4 blueberries left over which were not used for making muffins. The money made from the muffins was $40. 

***

They used all the blueberries they collected to make muffins and sold them. The money they made from the muffins was $40. Their effort and the blueberries they collected led to the youth.
